objective_hint: Harden the trust observe-only lane without enabling enforcement.
checkpoint_summary: Trust observe-only is noisy because doc prose is still being classified as secrets.

active_blockers.summary: Bare secret words in prose still force must_not_packetize

suggested_next_actions: Refine the trust scan so prose mentions of secret/password do not trip the hard packetization gate.
recent_failures: The observe-only trust scan marks docs with the word secret as must_not_packetize.
constraints: After reducing false positives, rerun replay-eval validate and memory-os kernel snapshot.
Keep trust observe-only until verification semantics are hardened.
notes: Intent-memory seed where the important follow-up is encoded as a constraint instead of an explicit open loop.
